history.content:
<thought>
The goal is near the bottom-right, and I am facing right. The cell immediately to my right is lava, so I should not move forward. I need to go downward first, which means turning right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the top-left area facing down. The goal `O` is on the lower-right side, and the direct path to the right is blocked by lava, so I should first move along the open corridor downward and then toward the right. Facing down is already aligned with moving to safer lower cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area of the map and facing down. The goal `O` is on the far right side of the same row, so I need to head right. My first step should be to turn toward the right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left (`<`) and the goal `O` is to my right and slightly below. The path directly left is blocked by the wall, so I need to turn to face a direction that lets me navigate around the lava toward the open corridor. Turning left will orient me downward, which is a useful first step to move into the lower open area.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal `O` is nearby on the lower-right, and I am facing down `v`. The cell directly below is open floor, so moving forward will take me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area and facing down, but the space directly ahead is a wall. The goal `O` is on the far right side of the map, so I should start by turning to face right and then move along the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the left side of the map facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is on the lower-right side, and the row ahead contains a clear path to the right from here, so moving forward is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
